lines.speaker: Chouani
lines.text: Nilsal, iknami. Would you like me to tan any hides for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks. I don't have any hides.

lines.speaker: Chouani
lines.text: No problem, iknami. Come back if you need me to tan any hides for you.

lines.speaker: Chouani
lines.text: No problem, iknami. Come back if you need me to tan any hides for you.
